title: A Family Trip and a Business Investment
article_text: My husband and I made a big investment in a small hotel near the lake. We needed a good score from the customers, so we had to organize everything carefully. Our first trip to see the hotel was beyond our expectations because the view was amazing. We did not sleep well that night because we had too much energy and excitement. My husband promised to help me with the fish market next to the bar, and I felt happy about his support. The only trouble we had was a relation with the local government, but we solved it quickly. We wanted to keep in touch with the community, so we opened a file for every visitor. The middle of the hotel had a large bar where people could drink and talk. We did not want to suffer from bad business, so we used a deep strategy to attract more guests. Every room was clean except one, and we fixed that room fast.

sentences.en: My husband and I made a big investment in a small hotel near the lake.
sentences.zh: 我和丈夫在湖边的一家小旅馆进行了大笔投资。

words.eng_def: the man a woman is married to
money put into something to get profit

sentences.en: We needed a good score from the customers, so we had to organize everything carefully.
sentences.zh: 我们需要顾客的好评分，所以必须仔细组织一切。

words.eng_def: a number that shows how good something is

sentences.en: Our first trip to see the hotel was beyond our expectations because the view was amazing.
sentences.zh: 我们第一次去旅馆的旅行超出了预期，因为景色太棒了。

sentences.en: We did not sleep well that night because we had too much energy and excitement.
sentences.zh: 那天晚上我们没睡好，因为精力太充沛、太兴奋了。

sentences.en: My husband promised to help me with the fish market next to the bar, and I felt happy about his support.
sentences.zh: 我丈夫答应帮我去酒吧旁边的鱼市，我对他的支持感到高兴。

words.eng_def: an animal that lives in water
a place where people buy drinks

sentences.en: The only trouble we had was a relation with the local government, but we solved it quickly.
sentences.zh: 我们遇到的唯一麻烦是与当地政府的关系，但我们很快解决了。

words.eng_def: a connection between people or groups

sentences.en: We wanted to keep in touch with the community, so we opened a file for every visitor.
sentences.zh: 我们想与社区保持联系，所以为每位访客建立了一个档案。

words.eng_def: to be in contact or communication
a collection of information stored together

sentences.en: The middle of the hotel had a large bar where people could drink and talk.
sentences.zh: 旅馆中间有一个大酒吧，人们可以在那里喝酒聊天。

sentences.en: We did not want to suffer from bad business, so we used a deep strategy to attract more guests.
sentences.zh: 我们不想遭受生意不好的痛苦，所以用了一个深刻的策略来吸引更多客人。

words.eng_def: going far down or having great effect

sentences.en: Every room was clean except one, and we fixed that room fast.
sentences.zh: 除了一个房间，其他房间都很干净，我们很快修好了那个房间。

image_prompts: A couple standing by a lake, looking at a small hotel with a sign 'For Sale'
A hotel reception desk with a clipboard showing a high score, and a woman organizing papers
A couple driving in a car, looking excitedly at a beautiful lake view through the window
A bedroom with a couple lying awake, moonlight coming through the window, looking energetic
A man and woman at a fish market next to a bar, the man pointing at fish and smiling
Two people talking to a government official at a desk, with a 'Solved' stamp on a document
A computer screen showing a file folder labeled 'Visitors', with a hand touching the mouse
A large bar in the center of a hotel lobby, with stools and bottles on shelves
A businesswoman pointing at a chart with a deep arrow going up, labeled 'Strategy'
A hotel room with a cleaner wiping a table, and one room with a 'Fix Me' sign on the door
